title: Streaks
description: Simple origin realms mod to show in screen what the Badger asked for.
body:
**If you find any bug pls report to me!** [![my discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Talk%20to%20me-b3e4b0?labelColor=e4b3e0&logoColor=fff&logo=discord)](https://twitter.com/giikiflop)

Incompatible with Legendary Tooltips. This is a known issue and will be fixed soon.

Simple origin realms mod to show in screen what the Badger asked for.
its my first mod tho, and there may be bugs lol, so u can report it to me in anywhere.
![](https://files.catbox.moe/84ahh5.gif)

now with:
- Item highlighting for active requests
- Live progress tracking showing how many items are still missing
- Visual feedback when the required amount is obtained
